title: Database connection pool exhaustion
symptoms: DB timeout, connection pool exhausted, API latency high, HTTP 503, checkout-api unavailable, postgres max connections reached
root_cause: Postgres connection pool exhausted due to retry storm, long-running queries, or insufficient pool size
fix: Check active DB connections, terminate stale idle connections, restart affected API service, increase pool size carefully, scale API replicas, monitor p95 latency and 5xx rate
commands: kubectl logs deployment/checkout-api; kubectl rollout restart deployment/checkout-api; kubectl scale deployment checkout-api --replicas=8

title: CPU saturation due to retry storm
symptoms: CPU above 90%, payment-service retry storm, high latency, elevated error rate, downstream pressure
root_cause: Excessive retries causing CPU saturation and cascading downstream failures
fix: Enable circuit breaker, reduce retry count, add exponential backoff, temporarily throttle traffic, monitor CPU and latency
commands: kubectl top pods; kubectl logs deployment/payment-service

title: Network packet loss affecting payment service
symptoms: packet loss, payment-service unreachable, HTTP 504, gateway timeout, intermittent connectivity
root_cause: Network packet loss or degraded route between gateway and payment-service
fix: Check packet loss between gateway and payment-service, validate ingress and service mesh health, restart unhealthy pods, reroute traffic away from degraded node or zone, monitor 504 rate
commands: kubectl get pods -o wide; kubectl describe svc payment-service; kubectl logs deployment/payment-service

title: TLS certificate expired
symptoms: TLS handshake failed, certificate expired, HTTPS requests failing, HTTP 502 at gateway, payment-service dependency call failed
root_cause: Expired TLS certificate used by internal payment service endpoint
fix: Renew expired certificate, update gateway or ingress secret, reload affected service, validate TLS handshake, monitor HTTP 502 rate
commands: kubectl get secret; kubectl describe ingress; openssl s_client -connect payments.internal:443

title: Memory leak causing OOM restart
symptoms: memory usage above 95%, heap allocation continuously growing, OOM warning, pod restarted, service unavailable, latency increasing
root_cause: Application memory leak or unbounded heap growth causing OOM restart
fix: Capture heap profile, inspect memory growth, restart affected pods as mitigation, increase memory limit only temporarily, identify leaking code path, monitor restart count and latency
commands: kubectl top pods; kubectl describe pod; kubectl logs --previous deployment/recommendation-service

title: Input validation failure in payment API
symptoms: NullPointerException, token missing, processTransaction failure, payment-api error
root_cause: Missing input validation or null handling in payment transaction request
fix: Validate required token before processing transaction, add safe null handling, return controlled 4xx error, add regression test, monitor payment-api exceptions
commands: kubectl logs deployment/payment-api; kubectl describe deployment/payment-api

title: Windows CBS manifest validation failure
symptoms: CBS_E_MANIFEST_INVALID_ITEM, HRESULT 0x800f080d, Unrecognized packageExtended attribute, Failed to get next element, CBS_E_INVALID_PACKAGE, HRESULT 0x800f0805, WindowsUpdateAgent package failures, SQM upload failure
root_cause: Invalid CBS manifest metadata or corrupted Windows servicing package metadata
fix: Run DISM health scan, run SFC scan, inspect CBS.log for HRESULT errors, identify failed KB package IDs, avoid editing manifests directly, validate Windows Update health after scan
commands: DISM /Online /Cleanup-Image /ScanHealth; DISM /Online /Cleanup-Image /CheckHealth; sfc /scannow; findstr /i "error failed HRESULT" C:\Windows\Logs\CBS\CBS.log

title: Slow database queries
symptoms: DB timeout, latency high, connection wait time increasing, slow query logs, API response delay
root_cause: Missing index or inefficient query plan causing slow database queries and connection pile-up
fix: Analyze slow queries, add missing index, tune query plan, increase timeout only temporarily, monitor connection wait time
